user_query: I was fired without notice. (I work as crops and animal production in agriculture, based in Dar es Salaam.)
entities: sector=agriculture;sub_sector=crops and animal production;region=Dar es Salaam
reasoning_chain: Identify intent=dismissal_complaint → retrieve K001 (unfair_termination definition) + K014 (CMA timeline) + K018 (remedies). Apply: user was terminated without procedure → presumption of unfair termination → 60-day CMA window → possible remedies are reinstatement, re-engagement, or compensation.
solution_response: This may be unfair termination under ELRA s.36. Burden of proof is on your employer. File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Possible remedies under s.40 (LLA 4/2025): reinstatement, re-engagement, or compensation of 6-24 months remuneration depending on whether the procedure, reason, or both were unfair.
citation: ELRA 2004 s.36 (as amended by LLA 4/2025); CMA Rules; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

user_query: How many days of annual leave do I get? (I work as crops and animal production in agriculture, based in Dar es Salaam.)
entities: sector=agriculture;sub_sector=crops and animal production;region=Dar es Salaam
reasoning_chain: Intent=leave_query → retrieve K005 (annual) + K006 (sick) + K007 (maternity) + K008 (paternity) + K009 (unpaid). Present all 5 entitlements.
solution_response: Under ELRA you are entitled to: 28 days annual leave (s.29); up to 126 days sick leave per 3-year cycle (s.32); 84 days paid maternity leave (s.33, plus premature-birth top-up to 40 weeks under LLA 4/2025); 3 days paternity (or 7 extra for premature birth); and up to 30 days unpaid leave on written request.
citation: ELRA 2004 s.29; ELRA 2004 s.32; ELRA 2004 s.33 (amended); ELRA 2004 s.34 (amended); LLA 4/2025

user_query: Likizo ya mwaka ni siku ngapi? (Nafanya kazi ya kilimo cha mazao na mifugo kilimo, niko Dar es Salaam.)

reasoning_chain: Intent=leave_query → toa K005+K006+K007+K008+K009. Onyesha haki zote 5.

user_query: How much severance am I owed? (I work as crops and animal production in agriculture, based in Dar es Salaam.)
entities: sector=agriculture;sub_sector=crops and animal production;region=Dar es Salaam
reasoning_chain: Intent=severance_query → retrieve K003 (severance formula). Apply: severance = 7 × min(years,10) × monthly_wage/26.
solution_response: Under ELRA s.42, severance pay = 7 days basic wage × completed years of service (capped at 10 years). Daily basic = monthly wage / 26. Severance is NOT payable if termination is for misconduct. Tell me your monthly wage and years of service and I'll compute the exact amount.

solution_response: Chini ya ELRA s.42, kifuta jasho = siku 7 za mshahara wa msingi × miaka iliyokamilika (hadi miaka 10). Mshahara wa siku = mshahara wa mwezi / 26. HAKILIPWI kwa utovu wa nidhamu. Niambie mshahara wako wa mwezi na miaka ya kazi nikuhesabie.

reasoning_chain: Intent=notice_query → retrieve K004 (notice rule). Apply by pay frequency.

solution_response: The minimum age for employment is 14 years for light work only (no school disruption). 18 for hazardous work. Below 14 is unlawful under ELRA s.5. Report to the District Labour Office and police. ILO C138 and C182 ratified by Tanzania apply.
citation: ELRA s.5; ILO C138; ILO C182

user_query: Can my employer use a fixed-term contract? (I work as crops and animal production in agriculture, based in Dar es Salaam.)

reasoning_chain: Intent=fixed_term → K020.
solution_response: Under amended ELRA s.14(1)(b) (LLA 4/2025), fixed-term is allowed only for: (1) temporary workload ≤12mo, (2) graduate trainee ≤24mo, (3) seasonal, (4) specific project, (5) non-citizen matched to work permit, (6) public scheme, (7) externally-funded, (8) retiree, (9) tender-based.
